title: Extra Item Uses
description: A mod that adds more functions to items!
body:
## Features:
Using pickaxes, you can now crack certain blocks into different ones! In a chain, you can get back some of the resources used to make what you're cracking down. Stone Bricks can be cracked into Cracked Stone Bricks. Then they can be cracked into Stone. Then Cobblestone! Then you can do it all again.

Shovels get the same function, but instead of cracking, they can grind! Stone into gravel, gravel to sand. Allowing the farming of sand or gravel, and making them renewable!

Sticks are the last thing to get a major update, they can be used to chisel certain blocks!

## Data-Driven:
The three recipes in the mod, cracking, grinding, and chiseling are all data-driven and customizable in a data pack or addon mod.

## Default Recipes:
### Crackables:
- Stone Bricks to Cracked Stone Bricks
- Cracked  Stone Bricks to Stone
- Stone to Cobblestone
- Deepslate Bricks to Cracked Deepslate Bricks
- Cracked Deepslate Bricks to Deeplsate
- Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate
- Deepslate Tiles to Cracked Deepslate Tiles
- Cracked Deepslate Tiles to Cobbled Deepslate
- Nether Bricks to Cracked Nether Bricks
- Polished Blackstone Bricks to Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks
- Infested Stone Bricks to Infested Cracked Stone Bricks
### Grindables:
- Stone to Gravel
- Gravel to Sand
### Chiselables:
- Stone Bricks to Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Deepslate Bricks to Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Nether Bricks to Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Polished Blackstone to Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Quartz Block to Chiseled Quartz Block
- Red Sandstone to Chiseled Red Sandstone
- Sandstone to Chiseled Sandstone
- Infested Stone Bricks to Infested Chiseled Stone Bricks
